features.title: Lead + sub-agent orchestration
features.user_visible_behavior: A product+policy question yields reply with used_agents including lead and at least one specialist; Agent Trace shows delegate steps.
verification: POST /chat with refrigerator need + stock/source question (no API key ok).
Assert used_agents contains lead and catalog (and knowledge if ship mentioned).
Assert trace has lead delegate and finalize events.
evidence: 2026-07-17 refrigerator smoke: catalog top-3 uses category_code=38 SKUs and stock FAQ routes to knowledge without claiming availability.
features.notes: LLM path uses graph.py; offline path uses offline.py

features.title: Web chat API persists conversation

features.title: Google Sheet refrigerator catalog migration
features.user_visible_behavior: SalePilot advises on Tủ Lạnh category_code=38 from the provided Google Sheet, recommends only priced rows, keeps unpriced rows searchable, and never claims stock availability.
verification: python -m scripts.import_refrigerators writes a deterministic 1,692-row snapshot with 252 currently priced rows.
./init.sh and ./scripts/verify.sh pass with category_code=38, hard budget, dimension, stock FAQ, order validation, MCP API, and memory regression checks.
Frontend build, MCP build, MCP stdio smoke, and browser chat verification pass.
evidence: 2026-07-17 sha256 backend/data/products.json = e4a8df9d43e33b058fb68d322ab7ff40b0c0318b775518f0bfc0c55f132e9b2a; jq length=1692, category mismatches=0, priced=252.

2026-07-17 ./init.sh PASS; ./scripts/verify.sh PASS after regressions for hard budget no-match, unaccented budget parse, decimal dimensions, external water search, stock FAQ routing, and order quantity validation.
2026-07-17 browser /chat verified desktop and mobile screenshots under /tmp/opencode; console clean; POST /chat 200; top-3 refrigerator reply and Agent Trace visible.
features.notes: Implementation is on feature/refrigerator-catalog; main and dev remain base-only by branch policy. Source sheet has no stock column and no product-name column.

features.title: Local SalePilot MCP server
features.user_visible_behavior: A local MCP client can search and compare the refrigerator catalog, receive top-3 recommendations and guidance FAQ results, and create a CRM lead only after explicit consent plus a configured write token.
verification: ./scripts/verify.sh validates the FastAPI /mcp catalog, recommendation, FAQ, and token-protected lead contract.
cd mcp && npm run build && SALEPILOT_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npm run smoke validates six tools over stdio.
npm audit --omit=dev exits clean in mcp/.
evidence: 2026-07-17 MCP smoke PASS: six tools discovered and invoked via official SDK stdio client.
2026-07-17 MCP refrigerator checks PASS: top3 [1751097000066, 1751097000058, 1751097000065], external-water cheapest 1751097000109, hard-budget no-match ok=false.
2026-07-17 isolated SQLite write smoke created a channel=mcp lead only with matching MCP_WRITE_TOKEN / SALEPILOT_MCP_WRITE_TOKEN.
features.notes: Base MCP implementation is on feature/salepilot-mcp; refrigerator contract updates are on feature/refrigerator-catalog. main and dev remain base-only by branch policy.
